reasoning: Packet loss on the F1-c interface was identified as a 'hard error' with a high diagnostic weight, outweighing the volumetric symptoms of latency and throughput on the F1-u and E2 interfaces. The failure propagated from the control plane to the user plane and the RIC control plane.
actionable_steps: 1. Inspect physical and virtual links between O-CU and O-DU for F1-c traffic. 2. Verify O-CU and O-DU configurations for MTU mismatches or buffer overflows. 3. Check for faulty NICs or switch ports handling F1-c traffic.
